EHDS Logical Information Models, published by Xt-EHR. This guide is not an authorized publication; it is the continuous build for version 1.0.0 built by the FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. This version is based on the current content of https://github.com/Xt-EHR/xt-ehr-common/tree/cleanup-for-final and changes regularly. See the Directory of published versions

  • Mappings
  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

Logical Model: Imaging Report Obligations

Official URL: http://www.xt-ehr.eu/fhir/models/StructureDefinition/EHDSImagingReportObligations Version: 1.0.0
Computable Name: EHDSImagingReportObligations

Obligations for the logical model of imaging report.

Usages:

  • This Logical Model Profile is not used by any profiles in this Implementation Guide

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description Differentials, Snapshots, and other representations.

  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Obligations
  • Statistics/References
  • All

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
EHDSImagingReport 0..* EHDSImagingReport Imaging report model
header O 1..1 Base Imaging report header
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
subject O 1..1 EHDSPatient Patient/subject information
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
identifier O 1..* Identifier Unique identifier of the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
author[x] O 1..* EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation, EHDSDevice The author of the report.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
date O 1..1 dateTime Date of finalising/issuing the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
status O 1..1 CodeableConcept Status of the report
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
language O 0..1 CodeableConcept Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
documentType O 1..1 CodeableConcept Type of document (e.g. 18748-4 Diagnostic imaging study)
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
documentTitle O 1..1 string Human readable document title that can be displayed in search results, etc. This can be documentType's display name, or it can be assembled from multiple elements. Examples: 'Laboratory Result Report', 'Patient Summary of Jane Green 10.12.2024'
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
period O 0..1 Period Time of service that is being documented
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
attestation O 0..* Base Document attestation details
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
attester[x] O 1..1 EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSDevice Attester who validated the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
datetime O 1..1 dateTime Date and time of the approval of the document by Attester
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
legalAuthentication O 0..* Base Document legal authentication details
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
legalAuthenticator[x] O 1..1 EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation The person or organisation taking responsibility for the content of the document.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
datetime O 1..1 dateTime Date and time when the document was authorised
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
eventType O 0..* CodeableConcept Categorisation of the event covered by the document (e.g. imaging study types, body regions, modality, etc.). Selection of such tags or labels depends on the use case and agreement between data sharing parties. This meta-data element serves primarily for searching and filtering purposes.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
serviceSpecialty O 0..* CodeableConcept Additional details about where the content was created (e.g. clinical specialty)
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:process Consumer
custodian O 0..1 EHDSOrganisation Organisation that is in charge of maintaining the document/report.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
accessionNumber O 0..* Identifier Accession number - an identifier, managed by the RIS at the local level, which usually uniquely identifies an imaging procedure request, and links it to imaging study(ies) and related imaging report(s).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
intendedRecipient[x] O 0..* EHDSPatient, EHDSRelatedPerson, EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation, EHDSDevice Information recipient (intended recipient or recipients of the report, additional recipients might be identified by the ordering party, e.g. GP, other specialist), if applicable
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
presentedForm O 0..* EHDSAttachment A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
body O 0..1 Base Imaging report structured body
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderInformation O 0..* Base Order Information (Imaging Result Report could respond to multiple orders).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderId O 1..* Identifier Identifier(s) of the imaging service order.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
orderReason[x] O 0..* CodeableConcept, EHDSCondition, EHDSObservation, string An explanation or justification for why this service is being requested.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
clinicalQuestion O 0..1 string Specification of clinical question (goal of the investigation) to be answered by the imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
supportingInformation O 0..1 Base Additional clinical information about the patient or specimen that may affect service delivery or interpretation (additional types of information may be allowed in implementations).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
observation O 0..* EHDSObservation Clinical findings and other observations (e.g., height and weights of the patient).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
condition O 0..* EHDSCondition Conditions that may influence the service or result interpretation.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
priorMedicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Medication administered before ordering the service specifically for this procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
device O 0..* EHDSDeviceUse List of implants or devices that affect the course of the examination or its interpretation (e.g. metal implants).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
pregnancyStatus O 0..1 EHDSCurrentPregnancy Pregnancy status when the imaging examination was performed (e.g., pregnant, not pregnant, unknown).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
sexForClinicalUse O 0..1 CodeableConcept Sex parameter for clinical use - provides guidance on how a recipient should apply settings or reference ranges that are derived from observable information such as an organ inventory, recent hormone lab tests, genetic testing, menstrual status, obstetric history, etc. This property is intended for use in clinical decision making, and indicates that treatment or diagnostic tests should consider best practices associated with the relevant reference population.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
specimen O 0..* EHDSSpecimen Specimen information. Note: A specimen (not attached to a body) can be used for diagnostic, forensic and medical research purposes.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
exposureInformation O 0..1 string Information on total exposure to ionising radiation. This information is required by regulations in several EU countries.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
examinationReport O 1..1 Base Examination report content.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
modality O 1..* CodeableConcept Imaging modality (or modalities) used during imaging investigation (DICOM CID029).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
bodySite O 0..* EHDSBodyStructure All body parts investigated
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
imagingProcedures O 0..* EHDSProcedure Imaging procedure performed during imaging study.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
medicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Information about medications administered (contrast, sedation, stress agents, etc) during the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
adverseReaction O 0..* EHDSAllergyIntolerance Adverse reactions manifested during imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
results[x] O 0..* EHDSObservation, string Imaging report result data (report could consist of multiple observations)
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conclusion O 0..1 Base A concise and clinically contextualised summary including interpretation/impression of the diagnostic report.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
impression O 1..1 string Narrative description of the clinical conclusion (impression).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conditionOrFinding[x] O 0..* EHDSCondition, EHDSObservation Condition or finding from imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
recommendation O 0..1 Base Recommendation section for additional imaging tests or other actions
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
description O 1..1 string Narrative description of the recommended activities including additional test, medication etc.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
carePlan O 0..* EHDSCarePlan A complex and structured information about recommended goals, activities and objectives in the form of one or more formal care plan.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
comparisonStudy O 0..* EHDSImagingReport Documentation (reference) of a prior Imaging Report to which the current images were compared.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
dicomStudyMetadata O 0..* EHDSImagingStudy Metadata of the DICOM study. A study comprises a set of series, each of which includes a set of Service-Object Pair Instances (SOP Instances - images or other data) acquired or produced in a common context. A series is of only one modality (e.g. X-ray, CT, MR, ultrasound), but a study may have multiple series of different modalities.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
attachments O 0..* EHDSAttachment Report attachments
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer

A study comprises a set of series, each of which includes a set of Service-Object Pair Instances (SOP Instances - images or other data) acquired or produced in a common context. A series is of only one modality (e.g. X-ray, CT, MR, ultrasound), but a study may have multiple series of different modalities.

Documentation for this format

Summary

Differential View

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
EHDSImagingReport 0..* EHDSImagingReport Imaging report model
header O 1..1 Base Imaging report header
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
subject O 1..1 EHDSPatient Patient/subject information
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
identifier O 1..* Identifier Unique identifier of the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
author[x] O 1..* EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation, EHDSDevice The author of the report.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
date O 1..1 dateTime Date of finalising/issuing the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
status O 1..1 CodeableConcept Status of the report
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
language O 0..1 CodeableConcept Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
documentType O 1..1 CodeableConcept Type of document (e.g. 18748-4 Diagnostic imaging study)
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
documentTitle O 1..1 string Human readable document title that can be displayed in search results, etc. This can be documentType's display name, or it can be assembled from multiple elements. Examples: 'Laboratory Result Report', 'Patient Summary of Jane Green 10.12.2024'
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
period O 0..1 Period Time of service that is being documented
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
attestation O 0..* Base Document attestation details
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
attester[x] O 1..1 EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSDevice Attester who validated the document
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
datetime O 1..1 dateTime Date and time of the approval of the document by Attester
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
legalAuthentication O 0..* Base Document legal authentication details
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
legalAuthenticator[x] O 1..1 EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation The person or organisation taking responsibility for the content of the document.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
datetime O 1..1 dateTime Date and time when the document was authorised
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
eventType O 0..* CodeableConcept Categorisation of the event covered by the document (e.g. imaging study types, body regions, modality, etc.). Selection of such tags or labels depends on the use case and agreement between data sharing parties. This meta-data element serves primarily for searching and filtering purposes.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
serviceSpecialty O 0..* CodeableConcept Additional details about where the content was created (e.g. clinical specialty)
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:process Consumer
custodian O 0..1 EHDSOrganisation Organisation that is in charge of maintaining the document/report.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
accessionNumber O 0..* Identifier Accession number - an identifier, managed by the RIS at the local level, which usually uniquely identifies an imaging procedure request, and links it to imaging study(ies) and related imaging report(s).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
intendedRecipient[x] O 0..* EHDSPatient, EHDSRelatedPerson, EHDSHealthProfessional, EHDSOrganisation, EHDSDevice Information recipient (intended recipient or recipients of the report, additional recipients might be identified by the ordering party, e.g. GP, other specialist), if applicable
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
presentedForm O 0..* EHDSAttachment A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
body O 0..1 Base Imaging report structured body
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderInformation O 0..* Base Order Information (Imaging Result Report could respond to multiple orders).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderId O 1..* Identifier Identifier(s) of the imaging service order.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
orderReason[x] O 0..* CodeableConcept, EHDSCondition, EHDSObservation, string An explanation or justification for why this service is being requested.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
clinicalQuestion O 0..1 string Specification of clinical question (goal of the investigation) to be answered by the imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
supportingInformation O 0..1 Base Additional clinical information about the patient or specimen that may affect service delivery or interpretation (additional types of information may be allowed in implementations).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
observation O 0..* EHDSObservation Clinical findings and other observations (e.g., height and weights of the patient).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
condition O 0..* EHDSCondition Conditions that may influence the service or result interpretation.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
priorMedicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Medication administered before ordering the service specifically for this procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
device O 0..* EHDSDeviceUse List of implants or devices that affect the course of the examination or its interpretation (e.g. metal implants).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
pregnancyStatus O 0..1 EHDSCurrentPregnancy Pregnancy status when the imaging examination was performed (e.g., pregnant, not pregnant, unknown).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
sexForClinicalUse O 0..1 CodeableConcept Sex parameter for clinical use - provides guidance on how a recipient should apply settings or reference ranges that are derived from observable information such as an organ inventory, recent hormone lab tests, genetic testing, menstrual status, obstetric history, etc. This property is intended for use in clinical decision making, and indicates that treatment or diagnostic tests should consider best practices associated with the relevant reference population.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
specimen O 0..* EHDSSpecimen Specimen information. Note: A specimen (not attached to a body) can be used for diagnostic, forensic and medical research purposes.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
exposureInformation O 0..1 string Information on total exposure to ionising radiation. This information is required by regulations in several EU countries.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
examinationReport O 1..1 Base Examination report content.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
modality O 1..* CodeableConcept Imaging modality (or modalities) used during imaging investigation (DICOM CID029).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
bodySite O 0..* EHDSBodyStructure All body parts investigated
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
imagingProcedures O 0..* EHDSProcedure Imaging procedure performed during imaging study.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
medicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Information about medications administered (contrast, sedation, stress agents, etc) during the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
adverseReaction O 0..* EHDSAllergyIntolerance Adverse reactions manifested during imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
results[x] O 0..* EHDSObservation, string Imaging report result data (report could consist of multiple observations)
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conclusion O 0..1 Base A concise and clinically contextualised summary including interpretation/impression of the diagnostic report.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
impression O 1..1 string Narrative description of the clinical conclusion (impression).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conditionOrFinding[x] O 0..* EHDSCondition, EHDSObservation Condition or finding from imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
recommendation O 0..1 Base Recommendation section for additional imaging tests or other actions
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
description O 1..1 string Narrative description of the recommended activities including additional test, medication etc.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
carePlan O 0..* EHDSCarePlan A complex and structured information about recommended goals, activities and objectives in the form of one or more formal care plan.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
comparisonStudy O 0..* EHDSImagingReport Documentation (reference) of a prior Imaging Report to which the current images were compared.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
dicomStudyMetadata O 0..* EHDSImagingStudy Metadata of the DICOM study. A study comprises a set of series, each of which includes a set of Service-Object Pair Instances (SOP Instances - images or other data) acquired or produced in a common context. A series is of only one modality (e.g. X-ray, CT, MR, ultrasound), but a study may have multiple series of different modalities.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
attachments O 0..* EHDSAttachment Report attachments
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer

ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer

ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer

eventType O 0..* CodeableConcept Categorisation of the event covered by the document (e.g. imaging study types, body regions, modality, etc.). Selection of such tags or labels depends on the use case and agreement between data sharing parties. This meta-data element serves primarily for searching and filtering purposes.
Binding Description: (preferred): LOINC, SNOMED CT, dicom-cid-33-Modality

SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer

Binding Description: (preferred): SNOMED CT
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:process Consumer

ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer

ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
intendedRecipientEHDSPatient EHDSPatient

intendedRecipientEHDSHealthProfessional EHDSHealthProfessional
intendedRecipientEHDSOrganisation EHDSOrganisation

ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
body O 0..1 Base Imaging report structured body
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderInformation O 0..* Base Order Information (Imaging Result Report could respond to multiple orders).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderId O 1..* Identifier Identifier(s) of the imaging service order.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHALL:process Consumer
orderDateAndTime 0..1 dateTime Date and time of the order placement.
orderPlacer[x] 0..1 The person/organisation "authorised" to place the order. Order placer could be either a health professional, health professional organisation or the patient himself.
orderPlacerEHDSHealthProfessional EHDSHealthProfessional
orderPlacerEHDSOrganisation EHDSOrganisation
orderPlacerEHDSPatient EHDSPatient
orderReason[x] O 0..* An explanation or justification for why this service is being requested.
Binding Description: (preferred): SNOMED CT
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
orderReasonCodeableConcept CodeableConcept
orderReasonEHDSCondition EHDSCondition
orderReasonEHDSObservation EHDSObservation
orderReasonString string
clinicalQuestion O 0..1 string Specification of clinical question (goal of the investigation) to be answered by the imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
supportingInformation O 0..1 Base Additional clinical information about the patient or specimen that may affect service delivery or interpretation (additional types of information may be allowed in implementations).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
observation O 0..* EHDSObservation Clinical findings and other observations (e.g., height and weights of the patient).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
condition O 0..* EHDSCondition Conditions that may influence the service or result interpretation.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
priorMedicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Medication administered before ordering the service specifically for this procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
device O 0..* EHDSDeviceUse List of implants or devices that affect the course of the examination or its interpretation (e.g. metal implants).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
pregnancyStatus O 0..1 EHDSCurrentPregnancy Pregnancy status when the imaging examination was performed (e.g., pregnant, not pregnant, unknown).
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
sexForClinicalUse O 0..1 CodeableConcept Sex parameter for clinical use - provides guidance on how a recipient should apply settings or reference ranges that are derived from observable information such as an organ inventory, recent hormone lab tests, genetic testing, menstrual status, obstetric history, etc. This property is intended for use in clinical decision making, and indicates that treatment or diagnostic tests should consider best practices associated with the relevant reference population.
Binding Description: (preferred): HL7 sex-parameter-for-clinical-use
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
specimen O 0..* EHDSSpecimen Specimen information. Note: A specimen (not attached to a body) can be used for diagnostic, forensic and medical research purposes.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
exposureInformation O 0..1 string Information on total exposure to ionising radiation. This information is required by regulations in several EU countries.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
examinationReport O 1..1 Base Examination report content.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
modality O 1..* CodeableConcept Imaging modality (or modalities) used during imaging investigation (DICOM CID029).
Binding Description: (preferred): DICOM Modality
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
bodySite O 0..* EHDSBodyStructure All body parts investigated
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
imagingProcedures O 0..* EHDSProcedure Imaging procedure performed during imaging study.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
medicationAdministration O 0..* EHDSMedicationAdministration Information about medications administered (contrast, sedation, stress agents, etc) during the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
adverseReaction O 0..* EHDSAllergyIntolerance Adverse reactions manifested during imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
results[x] O 0..* Imaging report result data (report could consist of multiple observations)
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
resultsEHDSObservation EHDSObservation
resultsString string
conclusion O 0..1 Base A concise and clinically contextualised summary including interpretation/impression of the diagnostic report.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
impression O 1..1 string Narrative description of the clinical conclusion (impression).
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conditionOrFinding[x] O 0..* Condition or finding from imaging investigation.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
conditionOrFindingEHDSCondition EHDSCondition
conditionOrFindingEHDSObservation EHDSObservation
recommendation O 0..1 Base Recommendation section for additional imaging tests or other actions
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
description O 1..1 string Narrative description of the recommended activities including additional test, medication etc.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
carePlan O 0..* EHDSCarePlan A complex and structured information about recommended goals, activities and objectives in the form of one or more formal care plan.
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
comparisonStudy O 0..* EHDSImagingReport Documentation (reference) of a prior Imaging Report to which the current images were compared.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
dicomStudyMetadata O 0..* EHDSImagingStudy Metadata of the DICOM study. A study comprises a set of series, each of which includes a set of Service-Object Pair Instances (SOP Instances - images or other data) acquired or produced in a common context. A series is of only one modality (e.g. X-ray, CT, MR, ultrasound), but a study may have multiple series of different modalities.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
attachments O 0..* EHDSAttachment Report attachments
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populate Producer
SHOULD:process Consumer
